description: Multi-jurisdiction donation tax receipt routing record. Documents whether and how a given donor receives jurisdictional tax recognition for a TitheRouter-routed donation. Honest framing: religious-corp is NOT registered under 日本国 宗教法人法 (Preamble §0.4 Lv7+ unanimity lock); JP donors get NO tax deduction. US donors may obtain receipts via 501(c)(3) equivalent-determination opinion letter (external US tax counsel contracted via Public Fund); UK donors via Gift Aid registration; DE donors via Spendenquittung filing; other jurisdictions per fallback ladder.

donorDid.description: Donor's DID. MAY be a pseudonymous DID; tax-receipt issuance requires the donor to optionally reveal a tax-jurisdiction identity to chigiri (separate from religious-corp identity).

donationTitheRouterTxCid.description: TitheRouter on-chain transaction CID (the 10% Tithe auto-split per ADR-2605192130 already executed).

donationDateUtc.description: ISO 8601 UTC donation timestamp for tax-year attribution.

donorJurisdictionIso3.description: Donor's tax jurisdiction ISO-3 code (USA / GBR / DEU / FRA / JPN / etc.).

taxRecognitionStatus.description: Per-jurisdiction tax recognition status. NOT a tax-avoidance scheme designer (N4) — only documents what the jurisdiction recognizes.

externalTaxCounselContractCid.description: When US 501(c)(3) equivalent-determination opinion is sought, the Public Fund Safe contract CID for the US tax counsel engagement. Estimated cost $5-15k per opinion letter (one-time per Council Lv6+ approval).

receiptIssuedTo.description: Recipient identity for the receipt (per-jurisdiction format).

receiptDocumentCid.description: Generated receipt document CID (per-jurisdiction template from chigiri's taxReceipt template corpus).

consentCapabilityChannelUsed.description: If true, donor used the consent-capability bridge (ADR-2605192115 §4) to a parallel 一般社団 receiving vehicle for jurisdictional receipt. The Tithe + Public Fund flow remains in religious-corp; only the receipt-issuance path uses the bridge.

consentCapabilityVehicleEntityName.description: When consentCapabilityChannelUsed=true, the parallel entity name (e.g., 'etzhayyim-receipts-501c3-llc'). chigiri does NOT operate this entity; chigiri only routes.
